title: Vacancy for Teacher at Coursera India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Coursera India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at Coursera India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Teacher based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Coursera India International Enterprises:
Coursera India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Coursera India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
